location: R. Cel. Gallotti, 431 - Centro, Tijucas - SC, 88200-000

exterior_entrance.description: Exterior at night with 'Other' neon cursive sign, three oversized decorative bowling pin sculptures and a red bowling ball at the entrance
Collage showing teal exterior building, interior dining area, beer tap being poured, and food items

bowling_lanes_interactive.description: Main bowling lanes with purple/blue neon lighting, cosmic nebula display screen at the end, interactive touchscreen consoles, bowling ball rack, hanging greenery, and bar area visible
Multiple bowling lanes with cosmic galaxy display screen, blue/purple ambient lighting, overhead TV monitors showing 'Other Bowling Bar', cushioned seating area
Full panoramic view of bowling lanes with cosmic nebula wall display, purple/blue neon underlighting on gutters, interactive touchscreen stations, hanging plants, and lounge seating
Bowling lounge/waiting zone with 4 interactive touchscreen kiosks showing bowling game interfaces, colorful bowling ball selection display, wooden bench seating, 'BOWLING' text on wall, overhead TVs
Collage showing bowling lanes with 'SLIPPERY WHEN WET' text, overhead ceiling view with TV monitors, group of people socializing, and food/beer on table
Combined dining and bowling space overview showing rows of wooden tables, booth seating, bowling lanes in background with blue neon lighting, cosmic wall mural, inflatable bowling pin decoration

food_drink_area.description: Top-down view of multiple artisanal pizzas including pulled pork with cream drizzle, tomato/basil, and red onion varieties on dark background
Close-up of Neapolitan-style Margherita pizza with charred crust, melted mozzarella, fresh tomato slices, basil leaves, and olive oil drizzle
Dessert pizza with chocolate/Nutella spread and fresh strawberry slices, paired with Cabernet Sauvignon wine on red checkered tablecloth
Pizza slice being lifted showing melted cheese pull, topped with shredded chicken, with beer bottle in background
Dessert pizza with chocolate spread and white coconut shavings on black plate, served on red checkered tablecloth
Pub-style food spread with golden french fries, breaded fried items, grilled meat with melted cheese and tomato garnish
Gourmet burger with brioche bun, beef patty, cheddar, lettuce, onion, tomato, served with thick potato wedges and onion rings with dipping sauces
Refreshing pinkish-red strawberry cocktail in hurricane glass with crushed ice, fresh fruit chunks, and whole strawberry garnish
Beer being served alongside dinner, showcasing the bar's craft beer selection and food pairing
Cocktail and drink selection showcasing the bar's beverage offerings
Close-up of artisanal pizza showing quality ingredients and presentation
Overview of multiple food plates showing the variety of menu offerings
Display of meal platters showcasing restaurant's food presentation
Chocolate mousse dessert showcasing the sweet menu offerings
Dining area with wooden tables, X-back chairs, dark booth seating, bowling theme decor, galaxy/star mural, blue accent lighting, and hanging greenery

arcade_gaming_area.description: Arcade game cabinets lineup with Sonic the Hedgehog and other classic games, blue/purple neon wall lighting, reflective floor, modern gaming lounge atmosphere
Person playing Sega Daytona USA deluxe arcade racing simulator with steering wheel, bucket racing seat, blue ambient lighting, classic 90s 3D graphics on screen
Gaming-themed dining area with 'GAME OVER' illuminated letters, blue neon strip lights, galaxy wall mural, wooden tables, dark booth seating, gaming lounge atmosphere

branding_events.description: Decorative photo wall with 'OTHER BOWLING BAR SINCE 2017' white logo on artificial green foliage wall, framed by gold/black/white/silver balloon garland, inflatable bowling pin
Same green wall logo backdrop from different angle with elaborate balloon arch arrangement
Logo backdrop with 'OTHER BOWLING BAR SINCE 2017' on green foliage wall with metallic gold, silver, black and white balloon arch
Group photo of approximately 15 staff members wearing matching black 'Other Bowling' branded t-shirts, posed in front of green wall with logo and balloon decorations

Wide-angle interior overview showing the venue layout and atmosphere
Interior seating area with tables and booth arrangement
